name: Orb of Transmutation
description: Upgrades a Normal item to Magic

name: Orb of Alteration
description: Rerolls affixes on a Magic item

name: Orb of Augmentation
description: Adds one affix to a Magic item with only 1 affix

name: Regal Orb
description: Upgrades a Magic item to Rare

name: Orb of Alchemy
description: Upgrades a Normal item to Rare

name: Chaos Orb
description: Rerolls all affixes on a Rare item

name: Exalted Orb
description: Adds one random affix to a Rare item

name: Orb of Scouring
description: Removes all affixes from an item

name: Vaal Orb
description: Corrupts an item — random effect; cannot be modified further

name: Orb of Regret
description: Refunds one passive skill tree point
